html:
Exclusive to:

The Monkey Hut is a structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. They can be found on the Moon Quay land around the Queen as well as on the Docks.

Monkey Huts are home to Powder Monkeys. Each hut is inhabited by two monkeys. After death they will reappear from their hut after three in-game days. Monkeys come out of the huts only during the day and in dusk. In Winter, they stay in the houses until the end of the season. When spawned from a hut Powder Monkeys will receive the following items: a Cutless and a 30% chance of a Pirate's Bandana.

Trivia

  • Monkey Hut's design was based on Wagstaff's Lunar Essence Extractor as can be seen from the concept art.

Gallery

  • Concept art of the Monkey Hut shown in Rhymes With Play stream.
  • Concept art of the Monkey Hut shown in Rhymes With Play stream.
  • Concept art of the Monkey Hut shown in Rhymes With Play stream.
  • Concept art of the Monkey Hut shown in Rhymes With Play stream.
  • Concept art of the Monkey Hut shown in Rhymes With Play stream.

"monkeyhut"
“Treehouses are terribly flammable places to conduct experiments.”
–Wilson
“Ugh, nobody ever lets me into their tree forts.”
–Willow
“Is monkey house for monkeys.”
–Wolfgang
“I never cared for climbing trees, no matter how many times Abby prodded me.”
–Wendy
“THEY THINK THEY CAN LOOK DOWN ON ME?!”
–WX-78
“Despite their affinity with the ocean, the apes still seem to prefer sleeping in trees.”
–Wickerbottom
“Huh. I wonder what it might be like to live in a tree.”
–Woodie
“This place is infested with those monkey miscreants.”
–Maxwell
“Hark! We have found the raiders' fortress!”
–Wigfrid
“We don't want to play in those jerks' tree house! Even if it does look like fun...”
–Webber
“Those monkeys seem to be enjoying the high life out here, non?”
–Warly
“Cheeky house”
–Wormwood
“Looks pretty rickety to me.”
–Winona
“Knock knock! Won't you let me in?”
–Wortox
“Mermfolk houses better, florp.”
–Wurt
“Neat, a tree fort!”
–Walter
“I prefer living solidly on the ground, thank you.”
–Wanda
The Monkey Hut is a structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. They can be found on the Moon Quay land around the Queen as well as on the Docks.
Monkey Huts are home to Powder Monkeys. Each hut is inhabited by two monkeys. After death they will reappear from their hut after three in-game days. Monkeys come out of the huts only during the day and in dusk. In Winter, they stay in the houses until the end of the season. When spawned from a hut Powder Monkeys will receive the following items: a Cutless and a 30% chance of a Pirate's Bandana.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Monkey Hut's design was based on Wagstaff's Lunar Essence Extractor as can be seen from the concept art.

The '''Monkey Hut''' is a structure exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' introduced in ''[[The Curse of Moon Quay]]'' update. They can be found on the [[Moon Quay]] land around the [[Queen of Moon Quay|Queen]] as well as on the [[Docks]]. 

Monkey Huts are home to [[Powder Monkey]]s. Each hut is inhabited by two monkeys. After death they will reappear from their hut after three in-game days. Monkeys come out of the huts only during the [[Day-Night Cycle#Day|day]] and in [[Day-Night Cycle#dusk|dusk]]. In [[Winter]], they stay in the houses until the end of the season. When spawned from a hut Powder Monkeys will receive the following items: a [[Cutless]] and a 30% chance of a [[Pirate's Bandana]].

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Monkey Hut's design was based on Wagstaff's Lunar Essence Extractor as can be seen from the concept art.
